title: Figure 5 from: Biwersi M, Xu M, Heiðmarsson S, Pálsson S, Sorensen JL, Ólafsdóttir ES (2026) Mycobiont-specific primers for lichenized fungal genus Cladonia (Cladoniaceae, Ascomycota). MycoKeys 127: 1-23. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.127.167091
author: Biwersi, Maia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 5 Boxplots of pairwise distances for each marker, separated by category (within subclade, between subclades, between clades). Analyses were conducted for all four markers: a. MCM7; b. mtSSU; c. nrITS; d. RPB2. Asterisks above horizontal lines represent p-values from Wilcoxon rank-sum tests between adjacent categories are displayed above the boxes to indicate significant differences: *: 0.01 < p <= 0.05; ***: p < 0.001.
steps_raw: Figure 5 Boxplots of pairwise distances for each marker, separated by category (within subclade, between subclades, between clades). Analyses were conducted for all four markers: a. MCM7; b. mtSSU; c. nrITS; d. RPB2. Asterisks above horizontal lines represent p-values from Wilcoxon rank-sum tests between adjacent categories are displayed above the boxes to indicate significant differences: *: 0.01 < p <= 0.05; ***: p < 0.001.
